accessDenied.title: Access Denied
accessDenied.description: You don't have permission to access this page.

sections.managedProvidersDesc: Providers managed by your platform administrator. These cannot be edited or deleted.

errors.errorLoadingData: There was an error loading the data. Please try again.
errors.errorLoadingModels: There was an error loading the models. Please try again.

emptyState.noProvidersDesc: Configure providers above to start creating and managing AI models.

modelDialog.editDescription: Update the configuration for your AI model.

modelDialog.technicalNameDescription: Use the exact model name as specified by the provider's API documentation.

deleteModelDialog.title: Delete Model
deleteModelDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete the model "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

createProviderDialog.description: Configure a new LLM provider for your organization.
createProviderDialog.managedDescription: Managed providers are controlled by platform administrators and cannot be edited by organization users.

editProviderDialog.description: Update the configuration settings for your {{name}} provider.

deleteProviderDialog.title: Delete Provider
deleteProviderDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete the "{{name}}" provider? This will remove all configuration but keep it available for future setup.

providerCard.configureToStart: Configure this provider to start using its models
providerCard.noPermissionConfigure: You don't have permission to configure this provider

embeddingCard.activeDescription: This provider is active for embeddings in your organization.
embeddingCard.configureDescription: Configure this provider to enable embeddings generation.
